name: duckduckgo-image-search
title: DuckDuckGo Image Search
description: Search Images inside Raycast by DuckDuckGo Image!
author: jag-k

preferences.title: Locale
preferences.name: locale
preferences.description: The locale of the search (default: en-us)

preferences.title: Save Directory
preferences.name: saveDirectory
preferences.description: Directory where images will be saved (default: ~/Downloads)

commands.name: search-image
commands.title: Search Image
commands.subtitle: DuckDuckGo Image
commands.description: Find any image using DuckDuckGo Image Search

preferences.title: Moderate Search
preferences.name: moderate
preferences.description: Moderate the search results (may cause some results to be removed)
preferences.label: Moderate Search

preferences.title: License
preferences.name: license
preferences.description: The license of the images to search

data.title: Free to Share and Use Commercially
Free to Modify, Share, and Use
Free to Modify, Share, and Use Commercially

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
